title: Diagnosis of Psychological Defense Types
author: R. Plutchik, adaptation by L.I. Wasserman
description: Questionnaire for assessing the expression of psychological defense mechanisms.

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.text: Read the following statements. If a statement applies to you, select “Yes.” If it does not apply to you, select “No.”

questions.text: I am a very easygoing person and easy to get along with.
When I want something, I simply cannot wait until I get it.
There has always been someone I wanted to be like.
People do not consider me an emotional person.
I get upset when I watch films with indecent content.
I rarely remember my dreams.
People who boss everyone around make me furious.
Sometimes I get a strong urge to punch a wall with my fist.
It irritates me that people are too conceited.
In my fantasies, I am always the center of attention.
I am a person who never cries.
The need to use a public toilet requires an effort on my part.
I am always ready to listen to both sides in an argument.
I am easily angered.
When someone pushes me in a crowd, I feel ready to push back.
There is much about me that people admire.
I believe it is better to think something through completely than to fly into a rage.
I am sick a lot.
I have a poor memory for faces.
When I am rejected, I have thoughts of suicide.
When I hear something obscene, I become very embarrassed.
I always see the bright side of things.
I hate malicious people.
I find it difficult to get rid of things that belong to me.
I have difficulty remembering names.
I have a tendency toward excessive impulsiveness.
People who get their way by shouting and screaming disgust me.
I am free of prejudice.
I desperately need people to tell me that I am sexually attractive.
When I am getting ready for a trip, I plan every detail in advance.
Sometimes I wish an atomic bomb would destroy the whole world.
Pornography is disgusting.
When I am upset, I eat a lot.
People never bore me.
I cannot remember much of my childhood.
When I go on vacation, I usually take work with me.
In my fantasies, I accomplish great deeds.
Most people irritate me because they are too selfish.
Touching something slimy or slippery disgusts me.
If someone annoys me, I do not tell them so, but try to express my displeasure to someone else.
I believe that people will take advantage of you if you are not careful.
It takes me a long time to notice bad qualities in other people.
I never get upset when I hear about a tragedy.
In an argument, I am usually more logical than the other person.
It is absolutely necessary for me to hear compliments.
Messiness is disgusting.
When I am driving, I sometimes get a strong urge to ram another car.
Sometimes, when something does not work out for me, I get angry.
When I see someone bleeding, it hardly bothers me.
My mood worsens and I get irritated when I am ignored.
People tell me that I believe everything.
I wear clothes that hide my flaws.
It is very difficult for me to use obscene words.
I think I argue with people a lot.
What repels me in people is their insincerity.
People tell me that I am too impartial in everything.
I know that my moral standards are higher than those of most other people.
When I cannot cope with something, I am ready to cry.
I feel that I cannot express my emotions.
When someone pushes me, I fly into a rage.
I put out of my mind what I do not like.
I very rarely feel affection.
I cannot stand people who always try to be the center of attention.
I collect many things.
I work harder than most people in order to achieve results in the area that interests me.
The sound of a child crying does not bother me.
I get so angry that I want to smash everything around me.
I am always optimistic.
I lie a lot.
I am more attached to the work process itself than to the relationships that develop around it.
Most people are unbearable.
I would never go to a movie with too many sexual scenes.
It irritates me that people cannot be trusted.
I will do anything to make a good impression.
I do not understand some of my own actions.
I force myself to watch films with a lot of violence.
I think the situation in the world is much better than most people think.
When I fail, I cannot hide my bad mood.
The way people dress on the beach nowadays is indecent.
I do not let my emotions take over me.
I always plan for the worst so as not to be caught off guard.
I live so well that many people would like to be in my place.
Once I was so angry that I hit something hard and accidentally hurt myself.
I feel disgust when I encounter people of low moral character.
I remember almost nothing about my first years at school.
When I am upset, I involuntarily behave like a child.
I prefer to talk more about my thoughts than about my feelings.
I feel that I have not been able to finish anything I started.
When I hear about acts of cruelty, it does not affect me.
In my family, people almost never contradict one another.
I shout at people a lot.
I hate people who walk over others in order to get ahead.
When I am upset, I often get drunk.
I am happy that I have fewer problems than most people.
When something upsets me, I sleep more than usual.
I find it disgusting that most people lie in order to succeed.
I use a lot of obscene words.
